meta.keepalive_command: sh -lc 'nohup python3 -c "import time; time.sleep(300)" >/tmp/running_capacity_probe_sleep.log 2>&1 & echo sleep-started'

summary.note: This probe estimates how many sandboxes can stay running at once by creating one every few seconds, then retrying after the earliest sandbox finishes.
